changelog: Feature: Offline media caching – exercise images and videos now cached via Cache API for offline viewing.
Feature: Workout download with media – JSZip archives include exercise images and videos alongside workout JSON.
Fixed: Toast API calls in HistoryScreen – corrected toast.push({message, kind}) usage throughout download flow.
Fixed: ActiveWorkoutScreen JSX indentation – fixed misaligned cn() args that caused TypeScript parse errors.
Fixed: Backdrop blur removal – eliminated remaining backdrop-blur-sm across modal overlays for solid backgrounds.
